parsed.fixed_xml: <ITEM>20. <BIBL><TITLE>Falckeisische Bibel</TITLE> noch gantz neu in <FORMAT>Schweinsleder</FORMAT> gebunden, √† <PRICE>12. Gulden</PRICE></BIBL>, oder gegen einem neuen <BIBL><TITLE>Corpore Juris</TITLE>, <PLACE>Leipziger Edition</PLACE></BIBL> zu vertauschen.</ITEM>
parsed.explanation: 1. Fixed the typo in 'Schweins-leder' by removing the hyphen (corrected to 'Schweinsleder'). 2. Replaced the faulty XML entity '\u221a\u2020' with the valid XML entity '√†'. 3. Corrected the tag '<PRIZE>' to '<PRICE>' for semantic accuracy. 4. Closed the second '<BIBL>' tag properly by removing the misplaced comma inside the tag and ensuring proper nesting.
